project.name: OSAS WBSMS
project.description: Web-Based Student Management System for OSAS at Legacy College of Compostela: Laravel 12 + Inertia.js + React 18 + MySQL, with student profiling, validation, violations, concerns, dashboards, and admin account management.

revision_history.change: Initial test plan for OSAS WBSMS.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.purpose: Define how the team will verify that the WBSMS meets documented functional and non-functional requirements before pre-final submission.

scope.title: Scope
in_scope: Institutional portal authentication and role-based dashboards
Dashboard analytics and PDF report export
RBAC across student, student_assistant, faculty, admin
out_of_scope_for_this_test_cycle: Document request / clearance modules not yet in build
SMS/email notification delivery end-to-end (if not configured)
Formal load testing beyond course demo scale

items.name: Automated tests
items.role: Auth regression; extend for OSAS modules

features_to_be_tested.title: Features To Be Tested (user view + risk)

rows.reason: Out of scope; in-app notifications only.

approach.title: Approach / Strategy
methods: Unit: Pest/PHPUnit on controllers, form requests, and repositories.
Integration: Inertia routes, middleware, and MySQL persistence.
System: manual execution of Doc 2 cases in browser.
metrics: Test case pass rate by module

item_pass_fail_criteria.title: Item Pass/Fail Criteria
criteria: A test case passes when observed UI/behavior matches expected result with no blocking defect.
Critical failures in authentication, profiling, or RBAC block conditional sign-off.
Cosmetic issues alone do not fail critical paths if data remains correct.

suspension_and_resumption.title: Suspension Criteria and Resumption Requirements
suspend_if: Blocking defect stops profiling or login for all roles
resume_after: Smoke tests pass (login, profiling page load, one dashboard view)

tasks.task: Finalize test plan and Doc 2 cases
UAT with OSAS users + UTAUT survey

environmental_needs.title: Environmental Needs
environmental_needs.hardware_os: Windows 10/11 PC with 8 GB+ RAM recommended
environmental_needs.software: PHP 8.3+, Composer, Node 18+, MySQL 8.x, Chrome or Edge
environmental_needs.network: localhost (php artisan serve) or HTTPS deployment
environmental_needs.test_data: Synthetic student/staff accounts only; do not use real PII.

assignments.duty: php artisan test runs and logs

staffing_and_training.title: Staffing and Training Needs
staffing_and_training.text: UAT testers receive a one-page script: institutional portal URL, role accounts, and expected happy paths for profiling, validation, and concerns.

rows.mitigation: Prioritize manual Doc 2 execution for critical WBS-* cases.
Start Laravel Reverb before notification scenarios; document fallback.
